<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-māu]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[hak:Kui-mâu]][[ja:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[vi:Quý Mão]][[za:Gveiqmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-báu]][[zh-yue:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]]

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following [[Yang Water Tiger]] and preceding [[Yang Wood Dragon]]. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] [[Mizunoto (癸)]] corresponds to Yin [[Water (wuxing)|Water (水)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Rabbit (zodiac)|Rabbit (卯)]] corresponds to Yin [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], creating a [[Aioi|Five Elements#Mutual generation]] (Water generates Wood) relationship.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: kimi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão

==Years of Yin Water Rabbit==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit'''
|-
![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]]
|-
|
* [[43]]
* [[103]]
* [[163]]
* [[223]]
* [[283]]
* [[343]]
* [[403]]
* [[463]]
* [[523]]
* [[583]]
* [[643]]
* [[703]]
* [[763]]
* [[823]]
* [[883]]
* [[943]]
|
* [[1003]]
* [[1063]]
* [[1123]]
* [[1183]]
* [[1243]]
* [[1303]]
* [[1363]]
* [[1423]]
* [[1483]]
* [[1543]]
* [[1603]]
* [[1663]]
* [[1723]]
* [[1783]]
* [[1843]]
* [[1903]]
* [[1963]]
|
* [[2023]]
* [[2083]]
* [[:en:2143|2143]]
* [[:en:2203|2203]]
* [[:en:2263|2263]]
* [[:en:2323|2323]]
* [[:en:2383|2383]]
* [[:en:2443|2443]]
* [[2503]]
* [[2563]]
* [[2623]]
* [[2683]]
* [[2743]]
* [[2803]]
* [[2863]]
* [[:en:2923|2923]]
* [[:en:2983|2983]]
|}

==Months of Yin Water Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] [[Mizunoe (壬)]] or [[Hinoto (丁)]]), the [[February]] of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]], and in some cases, the [[Solar term]] (from [[Jingzhe]] to the day before [[Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.

==Days of Yin Water Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the [[Tenitsu-shin]] cycle.

== References ==
{{Reflist|qq=}}

==See Also==
<!--Yin Water Rabbit--><!--Yin Water Rabbit-->

{{wikidata link|Q904471}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
